hooks.command: npm run lint 2>&1 && npm run build 2>&1 && npm run test 2>&1

if jq -r '.tool_input.command | if type == "array" then join(" ") else (. // "") end' | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+reset\s+--hard|DROP\s+TABLE'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 위험한 명령어가 감지되었습니다.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
